name: 1. Deep Learning With Grokking By Andrew Trask. - MNIST Notes
description: A fully connected network built from scratch using only NumPy while working through Grokking Deep Learning by Andrew Trask.

results.summary: 97.8% test accuracy on 10,000 unseen images after 200 training iterations using mini-batch gradient descent (batch size 100, alpha 0.06). Train/test gap of only ~0.2%, indicating the network generalises well.
